name: Scottish Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the butter until light and creamy.
3. Add 1/2 cup sugar and beat until the mixture is fluffy.
4. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
5. Fold the dry ingredients into the butter mixture.
6. Place the dough on an unbuttered baking sheet and pat it into a rectangle that is about half an inch thick.
7. Cut the dough into 1" x 2-inch bars using the point of a knife.
8. Sprinkle the remaining sugar over the bars.
9. Bake in the center of the oven for 15 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for 15 minutes before cutting into bars as marked.
